title: nasturtium oleraceum
intro: Nasturtium oleraceum, also known as the common watercress, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is a perennial plant that grows in wetlands and is known for its peppery taste and medicinal properties. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, nasturtium oleraceum is often used as a tea or tincture to support health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health.
